raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX my XXXX received a text saying she owed {$8.00} for a toll in Illinois. She lives in IL and figured it was legit, so she clicked through the link and attempted to pay the {$8.00} with a Citibank XXXX XXXX card. I happened to be on the phone with her right after it happened and immediately recognized it as fraud. I immediately froze the card, but not before they scammers stole the card information and used it to make unauthorized charges in somewhere in XXXX. Citi is saying " they dont cover scams ''. The card information was stolen via deception and used to make totally unauthorized charges in XXXX.
